subcodes.first_line: O my God! Unto Thee be praise and thanksgiving for having raised up from among Thy servants ones pure in heart, whose inner natures are sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد و لک الشکر بما بعثت من بین عبادک صفوتا طابت سرائرهم
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @prayer for praise and gratitude
